name: samvida
description: An OpenClaw skill to generate agentic contracts (llms.txt) for your business. Crawls your website, fills gaps conversationally, and produces a structured agent-optimized llms.txt ready to deploy.
author: ngm9

runtime.note: Skill assumes a Python virtualenv at ~/.virtualenvs/samvida with httpx installed. Generation is handled by your configured OpenClaw LLM — no separate API key required. Create venv with: python3 -m venv ~/.virtualenvs/samvida && ~/.virtualenvs/samvida/bin/pip install httpx

fields.name: CF_API_TOKEN
fields.description: Cloudflare API token with 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' permissions

fields.name: CF_ZONE_ID
fields.description: Zone ID for your domain (domain page → right sidebar)

cloudflare.note: Prompted at deploy time, never stored by the skill

fields.name: WEBFLOW_SITE_API_TOKEN
fields.description: Webflow Site API token with Assets, Sites, Redirects, and Publishing scopes

webflow.note: Prompted at deploy time, never stored by the skill

paths.note: Paths assume OpenClaw default workspace at ~/.openclaw/workspace. Adjust if your workspace path differs.
